title: verbascum phlomoides var. nothum
intro: Verbascum phlomoides var. nothum, also known as mullien, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mullein family (Verbascum spp.). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Verbascum phlomoides var. nothum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used in combination with other herbs for their medicinal properties.
